text:
B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables
32
su_dispo_lang: Language of Survey Data Collection
SAS Format: $LANGF
1: ENGLISH
2: SPANISH
3: CHINESE
4: VIETNAMESE
5: KOREAN
6: TAGALOG
7: MANDARIN
88: NA
8: CANTONESE
su_dispositn: Final Disposition Code
SAS Format: $FDISPF
10: COMPLETED SURVEY
11: INSTITUTIONALIZED
20: DECEASED
22: LANGUAGE BARRIER
24: MENT/PHYS UNABLE TO RESPOND
31: PARTIALLY COMPLETE SURVEY
32: REFUSAL
33: NON-RESPONSE
34: BLANK RETURNED
35: BAD ADDRESS/BAD PHONE
37: ANALYTIC COMPLETE
40:
